title: Charter doctor result
description: Machine-readable contract for `charter doctor --format json`: the result envelope plus the per-finding `locations` array defined by ADR-0009.
$comment: Contract-first artifact per ADR-0004; links to ADR-0009 (structured finding location). Future additive fields (e.g. auto_fix, guidance for M1.4) land as versioned schema changes, each linked to an ADR.

repo_path.description: Resolved repository root used for the scan.

threshold.description: Effective passing threshold echoed from the invocation.

findings.description: All findings in deterministic order: severity weight descending, then rule_id ascending.

locations.description: Physical sites implicated by the finding; empty for absence findings. Maps onto SARIF result.locations[].physicalLocation.

evidence.description: Human-readable, secret-redacted detail lines. Not the carrier of location data.

path.description: Repo-relative, forward-slash path. Maps to SARIF artifactLocation.uri.

line.description: 1-based line number; 0 means file-level (no specific line). Maps to SARIF region.startLine.

base.description: Uncapped score from severity penalties, floored at 0.

final.description: Score after the blocker cap and per-finding caps are applied.
